name: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc.
business: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on the research, development and commercialization of cannabinoid-based technologies for the detection and treatment of cancer. The company has only commercialized Cannabics SR, a non-pharmaceutical extended release capsule for palliative therapy. It has not generated significant revenue and relies on financing to fund operations.

exposures.sentence: Our business is focused entirely upon the research, development and commercialization of cannabinoid-based technologies for the detection and treatment of cancer.
